commands.review_summary:
The PR canonicalizes workspace-only host write/edit targets through existing in-workspace symlink parents before delegating to fs-safe writes, with symlink-parent and escape regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: current main passes lexical workspace-relative write/edit paths to fs-safe, whose pinned write path derives the parent from that relative path. I did not execute the failing case locally in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is needed; the remaining action is maintainer review of a security-boundary filesystem change plus normal CI/validation before merge.
